scripts.link: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const h=require('os').homedir();const d=p.join(h,'.config','opencode','plugins');if(!fs.existsSync(d))fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});['plugin.js','session-tracker.js'].forEach(f=>{const t=p.join(d,f);if(fs.existsSync(t))fs.unlinkSync(t);fs.symlinkSync(p.join(__dirname,'dist',f),t);});console.log('Linked to',d);"
